| Parcel ID (teigid) | Area (m²) |
| :--- | :--- |
| 166126299 | 1,003,011.8 |
| 278565584 | 728,523.9 |
| 279097948 | 699,659.5 |
| 166080922 | 646,370.8 |
| 279089652 | 569,001.0 |
| 166074831 | 476,071.5 |
| 166074431 | 540,476.4 |
| 166074694 | 280,483.4 |
| 166074587 | 95,465.9 |
| 166072723 | 45,326.7 |

*(Note: The final list is based on the top 10 records sorted by area descending from the executed analysis.)*

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT fylkesnavn FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnummer = LEFT('5001', 2)

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade FROM kvikkleire_87067f98e29a47d4901328f3a926a515.utlosningomr WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '4'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, lagretberegnetareal, geom FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_gis.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND lagretberegnetareal > 5000

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- left_source: 4
-- right_geom: "omrade"
-- right_source: 3

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- aggregation_type: "max"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_as: "lagretberegnetareal"
-- metric_column: "lagretberegnetareal"
-- source_step: 5

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: sort
-- order_by: "lagretberegnetareal"
-- order_direction: "desc"
-- source_step: 6

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
